sourcesContent:
# Heredoc indentation baselines: inline-start content, inline closers,
# closer-column vs shallowest-content-line stripping, interpolated
# forms.
inline = """{
  a: 1,
}
"""
inlineClose = """{
  b: 2,
}"""
padded = """  lead
  next"""
deepCloser = """
  alpha
    beta
      """
shallowLine = """
    kept
  base
"""
name = "world"
interpInline = """greet #{name}
  more
"""
plain = """
  one
  two
"""
# Tab-indented content with an INLINE closer (the shallowest-content-
# line baseline is the literal tab string). Tab-bearing CLOSER lines
# live outside this byte corpus (rebuilding the
# closer column as spaces and strips nothing from tab content).
tabInline = """
	a
		b"""
tabDeep = """
	a
		"""
tabKeep = """
	kept
 """
